Welcome, and Thank You for installing TubeBuddy!
Step 1
Subscribe to our channel in order to stay informed of our latest Tools, Tips & Tricks
Step 2
Watch our Getting Started video below.
Popular Tools
Keyword Explorer
Discover trending topics, rank higher in searches, and get inspired for your next hit video. Your key to more views and visibility!
Suggested Shorts
Analyze your videos to discover which moments had the highest retention rate that may work well as a short.
Click Magnet
Quickly identify what content your audience is craving and learn what style of thumbnails will drive the most clicks.
Thumbnail Generator
Create professional quality thumbnails using still frames from your video with text and image layers added on top. Go to Channel Content and click the Tubebuddy menu next to the video. Then select Thumbnail Generator.
Health Report
Get an overall look at the health and performance of your channel.
Video A/B Testing
Discover which thumbnails, title, tags, and descriptions drive the most clicks and views to your videos. Test, optimize, improve.
Bulk Processing
Update hundreds or thousands of videos in a snap. Update cards, end screens, thumbnails, descriptions, and more. *Find in the Bulk Tools menu above your list of videos in Content.
COPPA Center
Scan your channel and discover which videos YouTube has rated "Made for Kids," as well as which ones are not.
Comment Moderation
Reply to comments faster by using pre-made Canned Responses. *Find by clicking ‘Edit’ next to a video.
Best Practice Checks
100% automated Best Practice Checks will ensure that each of your videos are following YouTube’s guidelines.
Videolytics
Access advanced analytics and insights instantly for any YouTube video. See how your own videos are performing and track your competitors.

Du bist nicht angemeldet
Videos, die du dir ansiehst, werden möglicherweise zum TV-Wiedergabeverlauf hinzugefügt und können sich damit auf deine TV-Empfehlungen auswirken. Melde dich auf einem Computer in YouTube an, um das zu vermeiden.

In diesem Video

Beschreibung

Vision Night
0Likes
0Aufrufe
53 Sek.Hochgeladen
Wir glauben, dass 2025 ein Jahr ist, in dem alle Gläubigen aus ihren Träumen aufwachen, im Glauben wandeln und mit der Umsetzung der Vision, die Gott ihnen gegeben hat, beginnen sollten. Wenn du also weißt, dass du eine Vision für 2025 hast, dann komm zu uns, um zu beten und die Salbung zu empfangen, die uns durch das Jahr 2025 führen wird. Es ist immer die Salbung, die den Unterschied macht. An diesem Abend werden wir das Heilige Abendmahl feiern, für die Kranken beten und für die Befreiung in Jesu Namen. Hinweis: Wir sind noch auf der Suche nach der richtigen Halle, die richtige Adresse wird Ihnen in den nächsten Tagen zugeschickt.
Weniger anzeigen ...mehr

What is COPPA?
COPPA stands for the "Children's Online Privacy Protection Act" and in accordance with the US Federal Trade Commission (FTC), YouTube is requiring all channel to designate each video as either 'made for kids' or not.
Failure to set your content appropriately may result in consequences on YouTube or have legal consequences under COPPA and other laws.
Please watch this video and visit links in the footer for more info.
TubeBuddy cannot offer legal advice.
 
What videos on your channel are made for kids?
TubeBuddy can scan your channel and surface videos that YouTube has identified as made for kids.
